reviews.comment:
Me hubiera gustado que la ofina del aca nos hubiera ayudado mejor, sentí que se lavaron las manos, llama x telefono y arreglate, le dijimos q nos costaba la comunicacion , bueno intentalo, sino vení otro dia y t comunico🙄

(Translated by Google)
I wish the office here had helped us better; I felt like they washed their hands of it. "Just call and sort it out," they said. We told them we were having trouble communicating, and they said, "Okay, try it, otherwise come back another day and I'll put you through." 🙄
